channel.title: Abouts on pascal.heidmann.io | developing in Hamburg... ⚓
channel.description: Recent content in Abouts on pascal.heidmann.io | developing in Hamburg... ⚓

item.title: About me
item.description: Hello world, I’m Pascal from lovely Hamburg and doing web development now for more 15 years - first as a hobby and nowadays for living. Current occupation Right now I’m happily employed at Germany’s largest comparing website, CHECK24, as a senior developer.
